Order To 1} Reduce Bond, And 2} Limit Successor Trustees Power To Act
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond And Payment Of Waived Fees
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Continued To Nov-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Simon for (trustee) Ana Guevara.

Mr. Simon reported that they have not filed the bond yet, that Ms. Guevara has been very sick, that she is now out of the hospital and that he has been in touch with the bonding agent. The Court asked what the issue is with getting the bond posted. Mr. Simon stated that she is bonded for the entire house, that they need to get her bonded for the other 1/2 of the house, that they do not expect issues in getting her bonded and confirmed that the bond in the estate case is still in effect and that they will be asking for the amount to be reduced. The status of filing bond was continued to November 8, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
